name: byte8/module-stock-radar
description: Stock Radar for Magento 2 — back-in-stock notifications with throttled batching, per-variant subscriptions, demand heatmap, GraphQL. Luma and Hyva compatible.

suggest.byte8/module-pingbell: Pipes subscriber-count alerts through the Byte8 admin notification channel.
suggest.byte8/module-stock-radar-plenty: Bridges Stock Radar with the PlentyONE connector so notifications fire on ERP-confirmed inbound stock.
